w:r.w:t: From Our Farms to Your Table
Where Responsible Farming Meets Refined Dairy Innovation
Artisanal Cheese • Premium Dairy Processing • Timeless Craft

where rich dairy heritage meets refined European cheese-making traditions.
techniques, and carefully controlled ageing processes.
We believe in purity above all.
That’s why our cheeses are made with:
From delicate fresh cheeses to rich, aged gourmet varieties, every product reflects our philosophy:
At Le Pondicherry Cheese, we don’t just make cheese
Le Pondicherry Cheese is proudly produced by
, rooted deeply in ethical practices and quality-first principles.

"Our vision has always been to build a dairy enterprise that respects both nature and science. Starting from a farm-based foundation, we have worked with dedication to create products that reflect purity, quality, and authenticity.
Agro & Dairy Enterprises, we believe that great dairy products begin with responsible farming, careful processing, and a commitment to excellence.
Our journey is driven by the passion to bring premium dairy experiences to consumers while maintaining the highest standards of integrity and sustainability.
We look forward to continuously innovating and expanding our reach while staying true to our values of qual
Not just cheese. A philosophy in every rind.
At Le Pondicherry, we believe what goes into our cheese matters as much as what comes out of it. Sourced from ethically raised herds, aged without shortcuts, an
pure goodness, from pasture to plate.
Farmed with care, never with chemicals
Richer in nutrition, richer in meaning
Eight years of craft. One unbroken promise.
Founded on conviction. Grown through patience. Defined by purity.
A farm. A belief. A beginning.
J. establishes Le Pondicherry Cheese in the heart of
on ethical farming, honest milk, and a quiet determination to do things differently.
Before a great cheese can be made, a great system must be built. We invested in the invisible the disciplines, the rhythms, and the
Milk processing comes to life. Value-added dairy takes shape. And one audacious recipe our signature
-Washed Rind announces us to the world.
State-of-the-art equipment arrives. Safety systems are elevated. And Le Pondicherry quietly becomes the name that premium restaurants across India trust.
The art of cheese, made personal.
We opened our world to yours with curated boxes delivered to your door and hands-on workshops that turn curiosity into craft.
The aging caves deepen. The story becomes an experience.
For the first time, guests could walk in, sit down, and let the cheese speak for itself. Our cave grew larger. Our welcome, warmer.
A platform built to carry our promise, everywhere.
With the launch of our e-commerce platform, distance stopped being a barrier. From Pondicherry to your table every order, a small act of trust we take seriously.
Innovation, sustainability, and an unrelenting pursuit of purity. This is not where our story peaks. It is where it deepens.
COMATHA AGRO & DAIRY ENTERPRISES PRIVATE LIMITED
into a trusted dairy enterprise while establishing
as a premium artisanal cheese brand known for its craftsmanship, natural quality, and refined taste.

modern technology and skilled workforce development

Every cheese at Le Pondicherry Cheese is crafted through a mindful, artisanal process:
Milk is collected at dawn from trusted local farms.
We use natural cultures to develop
Curds are cut and stirred manually for perfect consistency.
Each cheese is shaped in small
Our Swiss and hard cheeses are aged for weeks or months under controlled humidity.
Every batch is tested, cut, and packed with care.
This patient, traditional process is what gives our cheese its
A Pondicherry-made Cheddar-style cheese inspired by classic English cheddar-making methods.

A young Swiss-style cheese with a delicate sweetness and mellow nuttiness. It has the classic Swiss characteristics but with a creamier, smoother texture.

A Mediterranean-style firm cheese known for its ability to hold shape under heat - the perfect grilling cheese.

Designed especially for chefs and pizzerias, this cheese offers ideal melting, browning and longer shelf life.
Soft mozzarella pearls with refreshing tang and delicate stretch - perfect for gourmet cold plates.
A crumbly, tangy cheese inspired by classic Greek Feta. Brings brightness and saltiness to any dish.

Used in premium bakery & dessert menus
Fresh Indian cottage cheese, soft and versatile - a daily cooking essential in Indian households.

A soft, mild Swiss cheese aged only two weeks - perfect for beginners and light meals.

Crafted from milk collected daily from Pondicherry farms.
